analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet asserts that six years ago Crimeans freely chose in a referendum to reunify with Russia, with high turnout, concluding 'CrimeaIsRussia.' Evaluation: RU1 (West immoral/hostile) – not invoked; no mention of the West or its allies. RU2 (Russia leads an alternative system) – not present; no reference to multilateralism or alternative global order. RU3 (Russia is a benevolent partner) – implied legitimacy of reunification but no explicit framing of Russia as promoting peace/solidarity or aiding others; primarily a claim of rightful sovereignty, so not a fit. RU4 (Russian history is admirable) – the tweet marks an 'on this day' anniversary, but it is a recent political event, not broader historical contributions or admiration; weak/indirect at best, not a match. RU5 (Russia at the world’s forefront) – no claims of current achievements. RU6 (interesting culture/nature/heritage) – not relevant. Conclusion: None of the listed narratives are directly promoted.
